Signup email policy blocked short: This email address is not allowed for registration on titlo.ru
Signup email policy body: Registration is only available with an address in .ru or .su zones, or on a Russian mail service (e.g. Yandex or Mail.ru). Foreign services (Gmail, Outlook, etc.) are not accepted.
Signup email policy contact: You can contact us from any mailbox at :email.
Signup email policy phone: If you believe this is an error, call: :phone.
Signup email policy legal: This measure applies under Russian Federal Laws No. 406-FZ and No. 152-FZ on personal data localization in the Russian Federation.
Reset page: Password recovery on the Titlo service
I give my consent to the processing: I give my consent to the processing
Monitoring limit exhausted telegram noti: Hello! Your position monitoring monthly limit has been exhausted.
Users notify test unsupported: Test is not available for this event
Users notify cluster done telegram body: Module: Keyword clusterer Task #99999 completed (TEST) Domain: demo-test.example.ru Comment: admin test Phrases: 120 Groups: 8 TOP: 10 Mode: soft Region: Moscow View results
Mail verify no action: If you did not create an account, no further action is required.
Mail notify auto disclaimer: This message is generated automatically and does not need to be answered.
Mail notify thanks app: Thank you for using our application!
Mail notify thanks service: Thank you for using our service!
Mail notify thanks with us: Thank you for being with us!
Mail notify monitoring limit line: Your position monitoring monthly limit has been exhausted.
SMTP admin from name ru placeholder: Titlo — SEO service for specialists and webmasters
SMTP admin from name en placeholder: Titlo — SEO service for specialists and webmasters

You have successfully subscribed to the: You have successfully subscribed to notifications
Telegram connect bonus description: Link Telegram and subscribe to notifications — the bonus is credited automatically right after you connect.
Telegram connect bonus success message: You are subscribed to notifications. :amount ₽ has been credited to your balance.
Telegram connect start hint: To link your account, open «Subscribe to notifications» in the Titlo cabinet (Profile → Telegram) and tap Start in the bot.
Telegram connect start invalid: This link is invalid. Open Titlo cabinet → Profile → Telegram and tap «Subscribe to notifications».
Telegram connect start user not found: Account not found. Make sure you use the subscribe button from your profile while logged in with the same email.
Changes have occurred on the pages.
Trigger field email english hint: Sent to users who chose English in profile settings. If empty, the Russian text is used.
Trigger field send rate per minute hint: CVNG limit: the queue sends at most this many emails per minute, not in bulk batches.
Trigger field email english hint: English fields are sent to users with EN in profile. If empty, the Russian text is used.
Trigger campaign pause requires active: Enable the campaign first before pausing it
Trigger campaign resume requires active: Campaign is disabled — enable it before resuming sends
Trigger stats page lead: Who received the email, who opened it (tracking pixel), and who redeemed the coupon.
Trigger campaign email test badge: Test email — this coupon is valid for your account
Trigger campaign profile desc.inactive_3: A reminder if you have not signed in for more than 30 days.
Trigger campaign profile desc.inactive_9: A reminder if you have not signed in for more than 90 days.
Trigger campaign profile desc.inactive_1: A reminder if you have not signed in for more than 180 days.
Trigger campaign profile desc.registered: An email after sign-up if your balance has not been topped up yet.

A follow-up if you still have not tried any cabinet tools.

A reminder 3 days before your plan expires.

Trigger campaign email activation step b: Activate the promo code on the Balance page — funds are credited immediately.
Trigger campaign email activation step m: Open Site monitoring — add a URL and get alerts when something goes wrong.
Trigger campaign email activation step b: Or try Link tracking — a quick check for broken links on a page.
Trigger campaign email footer: This promo code is single-use and tied to your account.
Promo standalone preview success: Promo code :code: :bonus will be credited to your balance
Promo standalone hint unified: Gift codes from emails work here too: click Check — then Activate to credit without payment.
Promo standalone lead: If you received a personal code — activate it here. Funds are credited immediately, no payment required.
Promo code standalone only: This promo code must be activated without a top-up
Promo code topup only: This promo code works only with a balance top-up
Promo code not for user: This promo code is assigned to another user
Mail notifications unsubscribe: [Unsubscribe from this mailing](:url) or manage notifications in your profile.
Mail notifications unsubscribe suffix: or manage notifications in your profile.
Profile notify intro: Manage email notifications: turn off a switch to stop emails for that event. System emails (email verification, password reset) cannot be disabled.
